C

clean() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.scoreboard.CocoaBoard.ComponentEntry
clean the entry
CocoaBoard - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.scoreboard
CocoaBoard is an easier way to work with scoreboard Support the Observable api that let you make dynamic data change by itself without worrying about it CocoaBoard support multiple server software like (paper, minestom) CocoaBoard could be for a couple of players or single player also you can change between them
CocoaBoard(String, Observable<Component>, boolean) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.scoreboard.CocoaBoard
Constructor for CocoaBoard
CocoaBoard.ComponentEntry - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.scoreboard
Component Entry wrapper around observable to be able to flag dirty and see Kif need to be updated
component() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.scoreboard.CocoaBoard.ComponentEntry
Return the component
